evals.name: bootstrap-fresh-project
evals.prompt: I'm starting a new project for a REST API. Set up notes for tracking decisions.
evals.expected_output: Creates NOTES.md with scaffolded sections, wires into CLAUDE.md with Notes Discipline

evals.name: capture-explicit-decision
evals.prompt: We've been discussing database options for our API project. Let's go with PostgreSQL instead of SQLite for the database. The main reason is we'll need concurrent writes from multiple services.
evals.expected_output: Captures the decision in NOTES.md with rationale and rejected alternative (SQLite)

evals.name: reorganize-notes
evals.prompt: My NOTES.md is getting unwieldy — can you reorganize it.
evals.expected_output: Proposes restructuring of NOTES.md, asks for approval before making changes

evals.name: add-specific-note
evals.prompt: Also add a note about the fact that we're targeting Python 3.12 minimum.
evals.expected_output: Adds the Python 3.12 minimum requirement to the appropriate section of NOTES.md

evals.name: catch-up-conversations
evals.prompt: We just finished a long discussion where we decided: 1) use FastAPI over Flask because of async support, 2) deploy on Fly.io because the team already has experience, 3) skip GraphQL for now — REST is simpler and we can add it later. Can you capture all of that into notes?
evals.expected_output: Captures all three decisions with rationale in NOTES.md, each as a separate entry

evals.name: audit-completeness
evals.prompt: Did we record all the recent decisions? I want to make sure we didn't miss anything. We decided on PostgreSQL for the database, FastAPI for the framework, Fly.io for deployment, and GitHub Actions for CI. Check NOTES.md.
evals.expected_output: Compares the listed decisions against NOTES.md content, identifies any gaps

evals.name: implicit-decision-no-keyword
evals.prompt: You know what, forget Redis — let's just use an in-memory cache for now.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this as a decision and captures it in NOTES.md without being explicitly told to

evals.name: near-miss-question-not-decision
evals.prompt: Can you explain the difference between PostgreSQL and SQLite?
evals.expected_output: Answers the question without triggering notes capture — this is a question, not a decision

evals.name: rejected-alternative-capture
evals.prompt: I thought about using MongoDB but the team doesn't have experience with it, so no.
evals.expected_output: Captures the rejection with rationale in NOTES.md — the rejected alternative and why

evals.name: multi-decision-burst
evals.prompt: Ok let's go with FastAPI, deploy on Fly.io, and use GitHub Actions for CI.
evals.expected_output: Captures all three decisions as separate entries in NOTES.md, not just the last one
